name: GS Floor Designs
message: For over 25 years, G.S. Floor Designs, Inc has served Chicagoland with outstanding service and a drive to perfection. Beginning his professional career as a carpet installer, George Stevenson and his wife Denise have built an award-winning team in order to provide you, the customer, with the best possible service imaginable. Headquartered in Arlington Heights, Illinois and serving the Midwest with facilities located in Hudson, Ohio and Kansas City, Missouri, G.S. Floor Designs, Inc strives every day to meet and exceed every expectation set by their customers.
